title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe is a background monitoring service in AgentTaskRunner that triggers when context token utilization exceeds 85%: it summarizes each conversation-turn memory via LLM, computes local 256-d vectors using character 3-gram hashing, filters to memories with cosine similarity >= 0.3 to current goal, and updates session.selectedMemoryIds (optional dependency, cooldown 30s, only processes `conversation-turn` tagged memories).
